# Essence Source USA

Essence Source is a U.S.-market B2B botanical ingredient sourcing website for supplement, food, beverage, cosmetic, and nutraceutical buyers. The site focuses on product identity, COA/TDS document paths, sample review, RFQ preparation, and U.S. warehouse or replenishment discussion.

Use this file as a concise machine-readable guide to the most important public pages. Do not infer consumer medical claims from the ingredient pages. The site is intended for qualified B2B ingredient sourcing and documentation review.

Last updated: 2026-06-11

## Company and buyer context
- https://essencesourceusa.com/ - U.S. B2B botanical ingredient supplier homepage
- https://essencesourceusa.com/about.html - Company overview, operating model, and buyer verification notes
- https://essencesourceusa.com/quality.html - COA/TDS, testing files, and document request workflow
- https://essencesourceusa.com/warehouse.html - U.S. warehouse support and stock-path explanation
- https://essencesourceusa.com/insights.html - Market notes, technical notes, and buyer guide pathways
- https://essencesourceusa.com/contact.html - Official inquiry and sales contact path

## High-intent sourcing pages
- https://essencesourceusa.com/botanical-extract-supplier-usa.html - Botanical extract supplier USA landing page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/botanical-ingredient-supplier.html - Botanical ingredient supplier buyer page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/nutraceutical-ingredient-supplier.html - Nutraceutical ingredient supplier page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/bulk-botanical-extracts.html - Bulk botanical extracts sourcing and RFQ page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/custom-botanical-extract-manufacturing.html - Custom botanical extract manufacturing page

## Buyer guides
- https://essencesourceusa.com/resources.html - Buyer guides, documentation notes, and sourcing FAQ hub
- https://essencesourceusa.com/coa-tds-request-checklist.html - COA and TDS request checklist
- https://essencesourceusa.com/bulk-botanical-extract-rfq-checklist.html - Bulk botanical extract RFQ checklist
- https://essencesourceusa.com/green-coffee-bean-extract-supplier-guide.html - Green coffee bean extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/ashwagandha-extract-supplier-guide.html - Ashwagandha extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/black-ginger-extract-supplier-guide.html - Black ginger extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/reishi-mushroom-extract-supplier-guide.html - Reishi mushroom extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/elderberry-extract-supplier-guide.html - Elderberry extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/lions-mane-extract-supplier-guide.html - Lion's Mane extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/turkey-tail-mushroom-extract-supplier-guide.html - Turkey tail mushroom extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/saw-palmetto-extract-supplier-guide.html - Saw palmetto extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/grape-seed-extract-supplier-guide.html - Grape seed extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/fisetin-extract-supplier-guide.html - Fisetin extract supplier guide
- https://essencesourceusa.com/maca-extract-supplier-guide.html - Maca extract supplier guide

## Insights, market notes, and technical notes
- https://essencesourceusa.com/market-notes.html - Market notes for U.S. botanical ingredient buyers reviewing supply paths, origin variables, seasonal planning, and sourcing risk before RFQ.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/technical-notes.html - Technical notes for comparing botanical extract specifications, active markers, assay language, solubility, carriers, testing, and application limits.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/buyer-guides.html - Buyer guides and copy-ready templates for botanical ingredient RFQs, COA/TDS requests, sample review, application fit, and supplier qualification.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/extract-ratio-vs-standardized-extract.html - A B2B technical note explaining extract ratio vs standardized extract language, assay markers, COA/TDS review, supplier questions, and RFQ risk.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/green-coffee-chlorogenic-acid-grades.html - A B2B guide to green coffee bean extract chlorogenic acid grades, covering 10%-60% specs, decaffeinated options, solubility, COA/TDS, and RFQ risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/black-ginger-5-7-dimethoxyflavone-grades.html - A B2B guide to black ginger extract grades, covering Kaempferia parviflora identity, 5,7-dimethoxyflavone specs, HPLC, COA/TDS, and RFQ risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/artichoke-cynarin-chlorogenic-acid-specs.html - A B2B guide to artichoke extract specs covering Cynara scolymus identity, cynarin 2.5%-5%, chlorogenic acid options, HPLC, COA/TDS, and RFQ risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/black-garlic-sac-specification-notes.html - A B2B guide to black garlic extract SAC specs covering aged garlic identity, SAC 0.1%-1.0%, sensory fit, COA/TDS review, and RFQ risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/apple-polyphenol-70-specification-notes.html - A B2B guide to apple polyphenol extract specs covering apple-derived identity, 70% polyphenols, procyanidin context, COA/TDS, and RFQ risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/compare-botanical-extract-suppliers-usa.html - A practical B2B guide for comparing U.S. botanical extract suppliers by specification clarity, COA/TDS path, samples, warehouse support, and RFQ fit.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/coa-vs-tds-botanical-extract-buyers.html - A B2B guide explaining COA vs TDS documents for botanical extract buyers, including what each file should answer, RFQ timing, and QA review risks.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/coa-tds-request-email-template.html - Copy-ready COA/TDS request email template for botanical extract buyers, covering representative COA, lot COA, TDS, specs, samples, and QA context.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/bulk-botanical-extract-rfq-template.html - Copy-ready bulk botanical extract RFQ template for U.S. buyers requesting price, MOQ, lead time, packing, COA/TDS, samples, and specification support.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/botanical-extract-sample-request-template.html - Copy-ready botanical extract sample request template for buyers reviewing specifications, COA/TDS, sample quantity, application fit, and first-order path.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/green-coffee-bean-extract-buyer-guide.html - A B2B buyer guide for green coffee bean extract covering chlorogenic acid grades, application fit, COA/TDS review, sourcing risk, and RFQ questions.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/black-garlic-extract-vs-garlic-extract-buyer-notes.html - Buyer notes comparing black garlic extract and garlic extract for B2B sourcing teams reviewing SAC, odor, positioning, application fit, and documentation.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/elderberry-extract-sourcing-guide.html - A sourcing guide for elderberry extract buyers comparing specification, color, application fit, COA/TDS needs, seasonal planning, and supplier questions.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/lions-mane-extract-specification-guide.html - Specification guide for Lion's Mane extract buyers comparing mushroom identity, polysaccharide language, beta-glucan questions, documents, and RFQ fit.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/turkey-tail-beta-glucan-polysaccharide-notes.html - Technical notes for Turkey Tail mushroom extract buyers reviewing beta-glucan, polysaccharide, extract ratio, COA/TDS, and supplier questions.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/saw-palmetto-extract-buyer-checklist.html - A buyer checklist for saw palmetto extract procurement covering ratio extracts, specification language, application fit, documents, samples, and RFQ questions.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/grape-seed-extract-opc-specification-guide.html - Specification guide for grape seed extract buyers comparing OPC language, polyphenol positioning, COA/TDS review, application fit, and RFQ questions.
- https://essencesourceusa.com/maca-extract-supply-application-notes.html - Supply and application notes for maca extract buyers reviewing ratio extracts, capsule and powder formats, documents, sample path, and RFQ readiness.

## Application sourcing pages
- https://essencesourceusa.com/applications.html - Application hub for supplement, beverage, food, and cosmetic sourcing
- https://essencesourceusa.com/supplement-botanical-ingredients.html - Supplement botanical ingredient sourcing page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/functional-beverage-botanical-ingredients.html - Functional beverage botanical ingredient sourcing page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/cosmetic-botanical-ingredients.html - Cosmetic and personal-care botanical ingredient sourcing page

## Product and category pages
- https://essencesourceusa.com/products.html - Full botanical ingredient product catalog
- https://essencesourceusa.com/brand-ingredients.html - Brand ingredient collection
- https://essencesourceusa.com/specialty-ingredients.html - Specialty ingredient collection
- https://essencesourceusa.com/specification-extracts.html - Specification extract collection
- https://essencesourceusa.com/natural-mushrooms.html - Natural mushroom ingredient collection
- https://essencesourceusa.com/product-green-coffee.html - Green coffee bean extract product page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/product-black-ginger.html - Black ginger extract product page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/product-artichoke.html - Artichoke extract product page
- https://essencesourceusa.com/product-reishi-mushroom-extract.html - Reishi mushroom extract product page

- https://essencesourceusa.com/image-sitemap.xml - Image XML sitemap
